removeHierophantAbility.desc: The ability of the Hierophant to get additional First Aid Tents is removed.

removeSuccubusAbility.desc: The ability of the Succubus to charm enemy units is removed.

editBruteAbility.desc: Edit the value of the Brute's ability to receive gold after battle depending on the experience gained (range from 0 to 100).

removeOgreLeaderAbility.desc: The ability of the Ogre Leader to get additional Ballistas is removed.

removeAstralSpiritAbility.desc: The ability of the Astral Spirit to banish enemy units is removed.
